summary: HappyCo Concierge V1 admin session persistence regression fully resolved. All navigation flows between admin pages (dashboard, properties, diagnostics) now work correctly without redirecting to login. Session caching implementation successfully handles transient state changes.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@happyco.com works and dashboard loads properly
Navigation from dashboard to properties maintains session (no redirect to login)
Navigation from properties to diagnostics maintains session (no redirect to login)
Navigation from diagnostics back to dashboard maintains session (no redirect to login)
Property detail page accessible after admin navigation (/app/admin/properties/a4f7603e-dda0-4c44-b382-e159f8c773be)
Direct URL access to /app/admin/dashboard works after login
Direct URL access to /app/admin/properties works after login
Direct URL access to /app/admin/diagnostics works after login
Rapid navigation between admin pages maintains session
Page refresh on admin pages maintains session (no redirect)
Session storage correctly caches admin session data
Deep navigation from property detail to other admin pages works
Logout functionality works and properly clears session
Admin page access correctly blocked after logout
